item.title: Laravel 9 2FA - 使用 Authy 的两因素身份验证 | Laravel 9 2FA - Two Factor Authentication with Authy
item.description:
原贴@https ://codeanddeploy.com访问并下载示例代码：
在这篇文章中，我将分享如何实现Laravel 8、9 2FA - 使用 Authy 的两因素身份验证我们知道，两因素身份验证是我们应用程序安全性的额外层，以防其他人获得用户凭据并访问帐户。 通过这种实现，访问用户帐户肯定不会很容易，因为它需要其他验证才能继续进行身份验证。

在本教程中，我将使用 Authy 应用程序进行 Laravel 两因素身份验证，并将逐步向您展示如何做到这一点。

在开始之前，您需要下载我之前关于 Laravel 9 身份验证的教程，以便我们缩短流程。 但是，如果您已经拥有 Laravel 身份验证，那么您可以跳过它并直接实现 Laravel 两因素身份验证。

只需在此处访问有关身份验证的上一个教程。

现在让我们开始吧。

步骤 1. 设置 Laravel 两因素配置

使用 ENV，我们将添加以下代码。

 AUTHY_KEY = YOUR API KEY HERE

不要忘记创建一个 Authy 应用程序。

在此配置中，您需要稍后添加 A uthy Application API Key。

然后一旦完成，请将以下数组值添加到您的config/services.php 。

 'authy' => [ 'key' => env ( 'AUTHY_KEY' ) ]

第 2 步：通过 composer 安装 Auth

将以下行添加到您的composer.json里面需要 JSON 值。

它应该是这样的：

 "require" : { "php" : "^8.0.2" , "guzzlehttp/guzzle" : "^7.2" , "laravel/framework" : "^9.2" , "laravel/sanctum" : "^2.14.1" , "laravel/tinker" : "^2.7" , "authy/php" : "^4.0" },

然后运行以下命令：

第 3 步：将 Authy Two Factor 列添加到用户表

运行以下命令：

 php artisan make : migration add_authy_columns_to_users_table

这是迁移的最终代码：

 <?php use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration ; use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint ; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema ; return new class extends Migration { /** * Run the migrations. * * @return void */ public function up () { Schema :: table ( 'users' , function ( Blueprint $table ) { $table -> boolean ( 'authy_status' ) -> nullable () -> after ( 'password' ); $table -> string ( 'authy_id' , 25 ) -> after ( 'authy_status' ); $table -> string ( 'authy_country_code' , 10 ) -> after ( 'authy_id' ); $table -> string ( 'authy_phone' ) -> after ( 'authy_country_code' ); }); } /** * Reverse the migrations. * * @return void */ public function down () { Schema :: table ( 'users' , function ( Blueprint $table ) { $table -> dropColumn ( 'authy_status' ); $table -> dropColumn ( 'authy_id' , 25 ); $table -> dropColumn ( 'authy_country_code' , 10 ); $table -> dropColumn ( 'authy_phone' ); }); } };

然后一次完成。 请运行以下命令：

第 4 步：设置用户模型可填充值和两因素检查

这是下面的最终代码：

 <?php namespace App\Models ; use Illuminate\Contracts\Auth\MustVerifyEmail ; use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory ; use Illuminate\Foundation\Auth\User as Authenticatable ; use Illuminate\Notifications\Notifiable ; use Laravel\Sanctum\HasApiTokens ; class User extends Authenticatable { use HasApiTokens , HasFactory , Notifiable ; /** * The database table used by the model. * * @var string */ protected $table = 'users' ; /** * The attributes that are mass assignable. * * @var array<int, string> */ protected $fillable = [ 'name' , 'email' , 'username' , 'password' , 'authy_status' , 'authy_id' , 'authy_country_code' , 'authy_phone' ]; /** * The attributes that should be hidden for serialization. * * @var array<int, string> */ protected $hidden = [ 'password' , 'remember_token' , 'authy_id' ]; /** * The attributes that should be cast. * * @var array<string, string> */ protected $casts = [ 'email_verified_at' => 'datetime' , ]; /** * Always encrypt password when it is updated. * * @param $value * @return string */ public function setPasswordAttribute ( $value ) { $this -> attributes [ 'password' ] = bcrypt ( $value ); } /** * Check if factor enabled * * @return boolean */ public function isTwoFactorEnabled () { return $this -> authy_status == 1 ? true : false ; } }

第 5 步：为 Authy 添加服务类

现在让我们为我们的Authy.php添加一个服务类，导航App/Services文件夹，然后添加TwoFactor文件夹。 完成后创建Authy.php文件，然后添加以下代码。

 <?php namespace App\Services\TwoFactor ; class Authy { /** * @var \Authy\AuthyApi */ private $api ; public function __construct () { $this -> api = new \ Authy\AuthyApi ( config ( 'services.authy.key' )); } /** * @param $email * @param $phoneNumber * @param $countryCode * @return int * @throws \Exception */ function register ( $email , $phoneNumber , $countryCode ) { $user = $this -> api -> registerUser ( $email , $phoneNumber , $countryCode ); return $user ; } /** * @param $authyId * @return bool * @throws \Exception */ public function sendToken ( $authyId ) { $response = $this -> api -> requestSms ( $authyId ); return $response ; } /** * @param $authyId * @param $token * @return bool * @throws \Exception Nothing will be thrown here */ public function verifyToken ( $authyId , $token ) { $response = $this -> api -> verifyToken ( $authyId , $token ); return $response ; } /** * @param $authyId * @return \Authy\value status * @throws \Exception if request to api fails */ public function verifyUserStatus ( $authyId ) { $response = $this -> api -> userStatus ( $authyId ); return $response ; } }

第 6 步：设置配置文件控制器和路由

现在让我们通过运行以下命令来创建一个 ProfileController：

 php artisan make : controller ProfileController

然后在下面添加以下代码：

 <?php namespace App\Http\Controllers ; use App\Models\User ; use Illuminate\Http\Request ; use App\Services\TwoFactor\Authy ; class ProfileController extends Controller { protected $users ; protected $authy ; public function __construct ( User $users , Authy $authy ) { $this -> users = $users ; $this -> authy = $authy ; } public function index () { return view ( 'profile.index' ); } public function enableTwoFactor ( Request $request ) { $user = auth () -> user (); $checkUser = User :: where ( 'authy_country_code' , $request -> get ( 'country_code' )) -> where ( 'authy_phone' , $request -> get ( 'phone_number' )) -> first (); if ( is_null ( $checkUser )) { $register = $this -> authy -> register ( $user -> email , $request -> get ( 'phone_number' ), $request -> get ( 'country_code' ) ); if ( $register -> ok ()) { $authyId = $register -> id (); $user -> update ([ 'authy_status' => false , 'authy_id' => $authyId , 'authy_country_code' => $request -> get ( 'country_code' ), 'authy_phone' => $request -> get ( 'phone_number' ) ]); } else { return redirect ( 'profile' ) -> with ( 'authy_errors' , $register -> errors ()); } } else { $authyId = $checkUser -> authy_id ; } $this -> authy -> sendToken ( $authyId ); return redirect ( 'profile/two-factor/verification' ); } public function disableTwoFactor ( Request $request ) { $user = auth () -> user (); $user -> update ([ 'authy_status' => false ]); return redirect ( 'profile' ) -> with ( 'success' , __ ( 'Two factor authentication has been disabled.' )); } public function getVerifyTwoFactor () { return view ( 'profile.verify-two-factor' ); } public function postVerifyTwoFactor ( Request $request ) { $user = auth () -> user (); $verfiy = $this -> authy -> verifyToken ( $user -> authy_id , $request -> get ( 'authy_token' )); if ( $verfiy -> ok () ) { $user -> update ([ 'authy_status' => 1 ]); return redirect ( 'profile' ) -> with ( 'success' , __ ( 'Two factor authentication has been enabled.' )); } return redirect ( 'profile/two-factor/verification' ) -> with ( 'errors' , __ ( 'Invalid token. Please try again.' )); } }

然后让我们设置配置文件路由。

 Route :: group ([ 'middleware' => [ 'auth' ]], function () { /** * Profile Routes */ Route :: get ( '/profile' , 'ProfileController@index' ) -> name ( 'profile.index' ); Route :: post ( '/profile/two-factor/enable' , 'ProfileController@enableTwoFactor' ) -> name ( 'profile.enableTwoFactor' ); Route :: post ( '/profile/two-factor/disable' , 'ProfileController@disableTwoFactor' ) -> name ( 'profile.disableTwoFactor' ); Route :: get ( '/profile/two-factor/verification' , 'ProfileController@getVerifyTwoFactor' ) -> name ( 'profile.getVerifyTwoFactor' ); Route :: post ( '/profile/two-factor/verification' , 'ProfileController@postVerifyTwoFactor' ) -> name ( 'profile.postVerifyTwoFactor' ); });

现在，让我们为我们的配置文件设置导航，然后导航resources/views/layouts/partials/navbar.blade.php参见下面的代码：

 <header class= "p-3 bg-dark text-white" > <div class= "container" > <div class= "d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center justify-content-center justify-content-lg-start" > <a href= "/" class= "d-flex align-items-center mb-2 mb-lg-0 text-white text-decoration-none" > <svg class= "bi me-2" width= "40" height= "32" role= "img" aria-label= "Bootstrap" ><use xlink:href= "#bootstrap" /></svg> </a> <ul class= "nav col-12 col-lg-auto me-lg-auto mb-2 justify-content-center mb-md-0" > <li><a href= "#" class= "nav-link px-2 text-secondary" > Home </a></li> <li><a href= "#" class= "nav-link px-2 text-white" > Features </a></li> <li><a href= "#" class= "nav-link px-2 text-white" > Pricing </a></li> <li><a href= "#" class= "nav-link px-2 text-white" > FAQs </a></li> <li><a href= "#" class= "nav-link px-2 text-white" > About </a></li> </ul> <form class= "col-12 col-lg-auto mb-3 mb-lg-0 me-lg-3" > <input type= "search" class= "form-control form-control-dark" placeholder= "Search..." aria-label= "Search" > </form> @auth <div class= "dropdown" > <button class= "btn btn-secondary dropdown-toggle" type= "button" id= "dropdownMenuButton2" data-bs-toggle= "dropdown" aria-expanded= "false" > {{auth()->user()->name}} </button> <ul class= "dropdown-menu dropdown-menu-dark" aria-labelledby= "dropdownMenuButton2" > <li><a class= "dropdown-item active" href= "{{ route('profile.index') }}" > Profile </a></li> <li><hr class= "dropdown-divider" ></li> <li><a class= "dropdown-item" href= "{{ route('logout.perform') }}" > Logout </a></li> </ul> </div> @endauth @guest <div class= "text-end" > <a href= "{{ route('login.perform') }}" class= "btn btn-outline-light me-2" > Login </a> <a href= "{{ route('register.perform') }}" class= "btn btn-warning" > Sign-up </a> </div> @endguest </div> </div> </header>

第 7 步：在我们的身份验证中实施 Authy Two Factor

现在让我们在身份验证中实现 Authy Two Factor，我们需要修改 L oginController.php中的身份验证代码。 这是authenticated()方法中修改后的代码。


 <?php namespace App\Http\Controllers ; use Illuminate\Http\Request ; use App\Services\TwoFactor\Authy ; use App\Http\Requests\LoginRequest ; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth ; use App\Services\Login\RememberMeExpiration ; class LoginController extends Controller { use RememberMeExpiration ; protected $authy ; public function __construct ( Authy $authy ) { $this -> authy = $authy ; } /** * Display login page. * * @return Renderable */ public function show () { return view ( 'auth.login' ); } /** * Handle account login request * * @param LoginRequest $request * * @return \Illuminate\Http\Response */ public function login ( LoginRequest $request ) { $credentials = $request -> getCredentials (); if ( ! Auth :: validate ( $credentials )) : return redirect () -> to ( 'login' ) -> withErrors ( trans ( 'auth.failed' )); endif ; $user = Auth :: getProvider () -> retrieveByCredentials ( $credentials ); Auth :: login ( $user , $request -> get ( 'remember' )); if ( $request -> get ( 'remember' )) : $this -> setRememberMeExpiration ( $user ); endif ; return $this -> authenticated ( $request , $user ); } /** * Handle response after user authenticated * * @param Request $request * @param Auth $user * * @return \Illuminate\Http\Response */ protected function authenticated ( Request $request , $user ) { if ( ! $user -> isTwoFactorEnabled ()){ return redirect () -> intended (); } $status = $this -> authy -> verifyUserStatus ( $user -> authy_id ); if ( $status -> ok () && $status -> bodyvar ( 'status' ) -> registered ) { Auth :: logout (); $request -> session () -> put ( 'auth.2fa.id' , $user -> id ); $sms = $this -> authy -> sendToken ( $user -> authy_id ); if ( $sms -> ok ()){ return redirect ( '/token' ); } } else { Auth :: logout (); return redirect ( 'login' ) -> with ( 'message' , __ ( 'Could not confirm Authy status!' )); } } }

现在让我们为额外的层身份验证创建一个 TwoFactorController。 运行以下命令来创建它。

 php artisan make : controller TwoFactorController

这是 TwoFactorController 的完整源代码。

 <?php namespace App\Http\Controllers ; use App\Models\User ; use Illuminate\Http\Request ; use App\Services\TwoFactor\Authy ; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth ; use App\Http\Requests\TwoFactorVerifyRequest ; class TwoFactorController extends Controller { public function __construct ( User $users , Authy $authy ) { $this -> users = $users ; $this -> authy = $authy ; } /** * Display login page. * * @return Renderable */ public function show () { return view ( 'auth.token' ); } public function perform ( TwoFactorVerifyRequest $request ) { $user = $this -> users -> find ( session ( 'auth.2fa.id' )); if ( ! $user ){ return redirect ( 'login' ); } $verfiy = $this -> authy -> verifyToken ( $user -> authy_id , $request -> get ( 'authy_token' )); if ( $verfiy -> ok ()){ Auth :: login ( $user ); return redirect ( '/' ); } else { return redirect ( 'token' ) -> with ( 'authy_error' , __ ( 'The token you entered is incorrect' )); } } }

让我们为我们的两个因素创建我们的验证请求。 只需运行以下命令：

 php artisan make : request TwoFactorVerifyRequest

然后添加以下代码：

 <?php namespace App\Http\Requests ; use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest ; class TwoFactorVerifyRequest extends FormRequest { /** * Determine if the user is authorized to make this request. * * @return bool */ public function authorize () { return true ; } /** * Get the validation rules that apply to the request. * * @return array */ public function rules () { return [ 'authy_token' => [ 'required' , 'digits_between:6,10' ] ]; } }

然后让我们创建我们的视图来验证Authy Two Factor 。 在resources/views/auth文件夹中创建token.blade.php文件。 然后添加以下代码。

 @ extends ( 'layouts.auth-master' ) @ section ( 'content' ) < form method = "post" action = "{{ route('token.perform') }}" > < input type = "hidden" name = "_token" value = "{{ csrf_token() }}" /> < img class = "mb-4" src = "{!! url('images/bootstrap-logo.svg') !!}" alt = "" width = "72" height = "57" > < h1 class = "h3 mb-3 fw-normal" > Two Factor Authentication </ h1 > @ if ( Session :: get ( 'authy_error' , false )) < div class = "alert alert-warning" role = "alert" > < i class = "fa fa-check" ></ i > {{ Session :: get ( 'authy_error' ); }} </ div > @ endif < div class = "form-group form-floating mb-3" > < input type = "text" class = "form-control" name = "authy_token" value = "{{ old('authy_token') }}" placeholder = "Authy Token" required = "required" autofocus > < label for = "floatingName" > Authy Token </ label > @ if ( $errors -> has ( 'authy_token' )) < span class = "text-danger text-left" > {{ $errors -> first ( 'authy_token' ) }} </ span > @ endif </ div > < button class = "w-100 btn btn-lg btn-primary" type = "submit" > Verify </ button > @ include ( 'auth.partials.copy' ) </ form > @ endsection

然后让我们设置我们的两因素路线。 见下文：

 /** * Two Factor Routes */ Route :: get ( '/token' , 'TwoFactorController@show' ) -> name ( 'token.show' ); Route :: post ( '/token' , 'TwoFactorController@perform' ) -> name ( 'token.perform' );

这是我们路线的完整源代码。

 <?php use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route ; /* |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Web Routes |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Here is where you can register web routes for your application. These | routes are loaded by the RouteServiceProvider within a group which | contains the "web" middleware group. Now create something great! | */ Route :: group ([ 'namespace' => 'App\Http\Controllers' ], function () { /** * Home Routes */ Route :: get ( '/' , 'HomeController@index' ) -> name ( 'home.index' ); Route :: group ([ 'middleware' => [ 'guest' ]], function () { /** * Register Routes */ Route :: get ( '/register' , 'RegisterController@show' ) -> name ( 'register.show' ); Route :: post ( '/register' , 'RegisterController@register' ) -> name ( 'register.perform' ); /** * Login Routes */ Route :: get ( '/login' , 'LoginController@show' ) -> name ( 'login.show' ); Route :: post ( '/login' , 'LoginController@login' ) -> name ( 'login.perform' ); /** * Two Factor Routes */ Route :: get ( '/token' , 'TwoFactorController@show' ) -> name ( 'token.show' ); Route :: post ( '/token' , 'TwoFactorController@perform' ) -> name ( 'token.perform' ); }); Route :: group ([ 'middleware' => [ 'auth' ]], function () { /** * Profile Routes */ Route :: get ( '/profile' , 'ProfileController@index' ) -> name ( 'profile.index' ); Route :: post ( '/profile/two-factor/enable' , 'ProfileController@enableTwoFactor' ) -> name ( 'profile.enableTwoFactor' ); Route :: post ( '/profile/two-factor/disable' , 'ProfileController@disableTwoFactor' ) -> name ( 'profile.disableTwoFactor' ); Route :: get ( '/profile/two-factor/verification' , 'ProfileController@getVerifyTwoFactor' ) -> name ( 'profile.getVerifyTwoFactor' ); Route :: post ( '/profile/two-factor/verification' , 'ProfileController@postVerifyTwoFactor' ) -> name ( 'profile.postVerifyTwoFactor' ); /** * Logout Routes */ Route :: get ( '/logout' , 'LogoutController@perform' ) -> name ( 'logout.perform' ); }); });

感谢您阅读 Laravel 9 两因素身份验证。 我希望本教程可以帮助你。 如果您想下载此代码，请访问此处https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/laravel-9-2fa-two-factor-authentication-with-authy 。

快乐编码:)



原文:

Originally posted @ https://codeanddeploy.com visit and download the sample code:
https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/laravel-9-2fa-two-factor-authentication-with-authy

In this post, I will share how to implement Laravel 8, 9 2FA - Two Factor Authentication using Authy we know that the two-factor authentication is an extra layer of our application security in case other people get the user credentials and access the account. With this implementation, it will surely not be easy to access the user account because it needs other verification before can continue to authenticate.

In this tutorial, I will use the Authy app for our Laravel Two Factor authentication and I will show you how to do it in step by step process.

Before we can start you need to download my previous tutorial about Laravel 9 authentication so that we shorten our process. But if you have your Laravel authentication already then you can skip it and directly implement the Laravel Two Factor Authentication.

Just visit here the previous tutorial about authentication.

Now let's start.

Step 1. Setup Laravel Two Factor Configuration

Using ENV we will add the following code.

AUTHY_KEY=YOUR API KEY HERE

Don't forget to create an Authy application.

In this configuration, you need to add later the Authy Application API Key.

Then once done, kindly add the following array value to your config/services.php.

'authy' => [ 'key' => env('AUTHY_KEY')
]

Step 2: Install Auth via composer

Add the following line to your composer.json inside require JSON values.

It should be like this:

"require": { "php": "^8.0.2", "guzzlehttp/guzzle": "^7.2", "laravel/framework": "^9.2", "laravel/sanctum": "^2.14.1", "laravel/tinker": "^2.7", "authy/php": "^4.0"
},

then run the following command below:

Step 3: Add Authy Two Factor Columns to the Users table

Run the following command:

php artisan make:migration add_authy_columns_to_users_table

Here is the final code of migration:

<?php use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration;
use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema; return new class extends Migration
{ /** * Run the migrations. * * @return void */ public function up() { Schema::table('users', function (Blueprint $table) { $table->boolean('authy_status')->nullable()->after('password'); $table->string('authy_id', 25)->after('authy_status'); $table->string('authy_country_code', 10)->after('authy_id'); $table->string('authy_phone')->after('authy_country_code'); }); } /** * Reverse the migrations. * * @return void */ public function down() { Schema::table('users', function (Blueprint $table) { $table->dropColumn('authy_status'); $table->dropColumn('authy_id', 25); $table->dropColumn('authy_country_code', 10); $table->dropColumn('authy_phone'); }); }
};

Then once done. Kindly run the following command:

Step 4: Setup User Model Fillable Values and Two Factor Checking

Here is the final code below:

<?php namespace App\Models; use Illuminate\Contracts\Auth\MustVerifyEmail;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Foundation\Auth\User as Authenticatable;
use Illuminate\Notifications\Notifiable;
use Laravel\Sanctum\HasApiTokens; class User extends Authenticatable
{ use HasApiTokens, HasFactory, Notifiable; /** * The database table used by the model. * * @var string */ protected $table = 'users'; /** * The attributes that are mass assignable. * * @var array<int, string> */ protected $fillable = [ 'name', 'email', 'username', 'password', 'authy_status', 'authy_id', 'authy_country_code', 'authy_phone' ]; /** * The attributes that should be hidden for serialization. * * @var array<int, string> */ protected $hidden = [ 'password', 'remember_token', 'authy_id' ]; /** * The attributes that should be cast. * * @var array<string, string> */ protected $casts = [ 'email_verified_at' => 'datetime', ]; /** * Always encrypt password when it is updated. * * @param $value * @return string */ public function setPasswordAttribute($value) { $this->attributes['password'] = bcrypt($value); } /** * Check if factor enabled * * @return boolean */ public function isTwoFactorEnabled() { return $this->authy_status == 1 ? true : false; }
}

Step 5: Add Service Class for Authy

Now let's add a service class for our Authy.php navigate App/Services folder then add TwoFactor Folder. Once done create Authy.php file then add the following code.

<?php namespace App\Services\TwoFactor; class Authy { /** * @var \Authy\AuthyApi */ private $api; public function __construct() { $this->api = new \Authy\AuthyApi(config('services.authy.key')); } /** * @param $email * @param $phoneNumber * @param $countryCode * @return int * @throws \Exception */ function register($email, $phoneNumber, $countryCode) { $user = $this->api->registerUser($email, $phoneNumber, $countryCode); return $user; } /** * @param $authyId * @return bool * @throws \Exception */ public function sendToken($authyId) { $response = $this->api->requestSms($authyId); return $response; } /** * @param $authyId * @param $token * @return bool * @throws \Exception Nothing will be thrown here */ public function verifyToken($authyId, $token) { $response = $this->api->verifyToken($authyId, $token); return $response; } /** * @param $authyId * @return \Authy\value status * @throws \Exception if request to api fails */ public function verifyUserStatus($authyId) { $response = $this->api->userStatus($authyId); return $response; } }

Step 6: Setup Profile Controller and Routes

Now let's create a ProfileController by running the following command:

php artisan make:controller ProfileController

Then add the following code below:

<?php namespace App\Http\Controllers; use App\Models\User;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use App\Services\TwoFactor\Authy; class ProfileController extends Controller
{ protected $users; protected $authy; public function __construct(User $users, Authy $authy) { $this->users = $users; $this->authy = $authy; } public function index() { return view('profile.index'); } public function enableTwoFactor(Request $request) { $user = auth()->user(); $checkUser = User::where('authy_country_code', $request->get('country_code')) ->where('authy_phone', $request->get('phone_number')) ->first(); if(is_null($checkUser)) { $register = $this->authy->register( $user->email, $request->get('phone_number'), $request->get('country_code') ); if ($register->ok()) { $authyId = $register->id(); $user->update([ 'authy_status' => false, 'authy_id' => $authyId, 'authy_country_code' => $request->get('country_code'), 'authy_phone' => $request->get('phone_number') ]); } else { return redirect('profile')->with('authy_errors', $register->errors()); } } else { $authyId = $checkUser->authy_id; } $this->authy->sendToken($authyId); return redirect('profile/two-factor/verification'); } public function disableTwoFactor(Request $request) { $user = auth()->user(); $user->update([ 'authy_status' => false ]); return redirect('profile') ->with('success', __('Two factor authentication has been disabled.')); } public function getVerifyTwoFactor() { return view('profile.verify-two-factor'); } public function postVerifyTwoFactor(Request $request) { $user = auth()->user(); $verfiy = $this->authy->verifyToken($user->authy_id, $request->get('authy_token')); if ( $verfiy->ok() ) { $user->update(['authy_status' => 1]); return redirect('profile') ->with('success', __('Two factor authentication has been enabled.')); } return redirect('profile/two-factor/verification') ->with('errors', __('Invalid token. Please try again.')); }
}

The ProfileController functionality consists of enabling two factor, disabling two factor, and verifying two factor when adding it.

Then let's set up the profile routes.

Route::group(['middleware' => ['auth']], function() { /** * Profile Routes */ Route::get('/profile', 'ProfileController@index') ->name('profile.index'); Route::post('/profile/two-factor/enable', 'ProfileController@enableTwoFactor') ->name('profile.enableTwoFactor'); Route::post('/profile/two-factor/disable', 'ProfileController@disableTwoFactor') ->name('profile.disableTwoFactor'); Route::get('/profile/two-factor/verification', 'ProfileController@getVerifyTwoFactor') ->name('profile.getVerifyTwoFactor'); Route::post('/profile/two-factor/verification', 'ProfileController@postVerifyTwoFactor') ->name('profile.postVerifyTwoFactor');
});

Now, let's set up our navigation for our profile then navigate resources/views/layouts/partials/navbar.blade.php See the code below:

<header class="p-3 bg-dark text-white"> <div class="container"> <div class="d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center justify-content-center justify-content-lg-start"> <a href="/" class="d-flex align-items-center mb-2 mb-lg-0 text-white text-decoration-none"> <svg class="bi me-2" width="40" height="32" role="img" aria-label="Bootstrap"><use xlink:href="#bootstrap"/></svg> </a> <ul class="nav col-12 col-lg-auto me-lg-auto mb-2 justify-content-center mb-md-0"> <li><a href="#" class="nav-link px-2 text-secondary">Home</a></li> <li><a href="#" class="nav-link px-2 text-white">Features</a></li> <li><a href="#" class="nav-link px-2 text-white">Pricing</a></li> <li><a href="#" class="nav-link px-2 text-white">FAQs</a></li> <li><a href="#" class="nav-link px-2 text-white">About</a></li> </ul> <form class="col-12 col-lg-auto mb-3 mb-lg-0 me-lg-3"> <input type="search" class="form-control form-control-dark" placeholder="Search..." aria-label="Search"> </form> @auth <div class="dropdown"> <button class="btn btn-secondary dropdown-toggle" type="button" id="dropdownMenuButton2" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false"> {{auth()->user()->name}} </button> <ul class="dropdown-menu dropdown-menu-dark" aria-labelledby="dropdownMenuButton2"> <li><a class="dropdown-item active" href="{{ route('profile.index') }}">Profile</a></li> <li><hr class="dropdown-divider"></li> <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="{{ route('logout.perform') }}">Logout</a></li> </ul> </div> @endauth @guest <div class="text-end"> <a href="{{ route('login.perform') }}" class="btn btn-outline-light me-2">Login</a> <a href="{{ route('register.perform') }}" class="btn btn-warning">Sign-up</a> </div> @endguest </div> </div>
</header>

Step 7: Implementation of Authy Two Factor in our Authentication

Now let's implement Authy Two Factor in our authentication we need to modify our authentication code inside LoginController.php. Here is the modified code inside authenticated() method.


<?php namespace App\Http\Controllers; use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use App\Services\TwoFactor\Authy;
use App\Http\Requests\LoginRequest;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;
use App\Services\Login\RememberMeExpiration; class LoginController extends Controller
{ use RememberMeExpiration; protected $authy; public function __construct(Authy $authy) { $this->authy = $authy; } /** * Display login page. * * @return Renderable */ public function show() { return view('auth.login'); } /** * Handle account login request * * @param LoginRequest $request * * @return \Illuminate\Http\Response */ public function login(LoginRequest $request) { $credentials = $request->getCredentials(); if(!Auth::validate($credentials)): return redirect()->to('login') ->withErrors(trans('auth.failed')); endif; $user = Auth::getProvider()->retrieveByCredentials($credentials); Auth::login($user, $request->get('remember')); if($request->get('remember')): $this->setRememberMeExpiration($user); endif; return $this->authenticated($request, $user); } /** * Handle response after user authenticated * * @param Request $request * @param Auth $user * * @return \Illuminate\Http\Response */ protected function authenticated(Request $request, $user) { if(!$user->isTwoFactorEnabled()){ return redirect()->intended(); } $status = $this->authy->verifyUserStatus($user->authy_id); if($status->ok() && $status->bodyvar('status')->registered) { Auth::logout(); $request->session()->put('auth.2fa.id', $user->id); $sms = $this->authy->sendToken($user->authy_id); if($sms->ok()){ return redirect('/token'); } } else { Auth::logout(); return redirect('login')->with('message', __('Could not confirm Authy status!')); } }
}

Now let's create a TwoFactorController for our extra layer authentication. Run the following command to create it.

php artisan make:controller TwoFactorController

Here is the full source code for TwoFactorController.

<?php namespace App\Http\Controllers; use App\Models\User;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use App\Services\TwoFactor\Authy;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;
use App\Http\Requests\TwoFactorVerifyRequest; class TwoFactorController extends Controller
{ public function __construct(User $users, Authy $authy) { $this->users = $users; $this->authy = $authy; } /** * Display login page. * * @return Renderable */ public function show() { return view('auth.token'); } public function perform(TwoFactorVerifyRequest $request) { $user = $this->users->find(session('auth.2fa.id')); if(!$user){ return redirect('login'); } $verfiy = $this->authy->verifyToken($user->authy_id, $request->get('authy_token')); if($verfiy->ok()){ Auth::login($user); return redirect('/'); } else { return redirect('token')->with('authy_error', __('The token you entered is incorrect')); } }
}

Let's create our Validation Request for our Two Factor. Just run the following command:

php artisan make:request TwoFactorVerifyRequest

Then add the following code:

<?php namespace App\Http\Requests; use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest; class TwoFactorVerifyRequest extends FormRequest
{ /** * Determine if the user is authorized to make this request. * * @return bool */ public function authorize() { return true; } /** * Get the validation rules that apply to the request. * * @return array */ public function rules() { return [ 'authy_token' => ['required', 'digits_between:6,10'] ]; }
}

Then let's create our view for verifying the Authy Two Factor. Inside resources/views/auth folder create token.blade.php file. Then add the following code.

@extends('layouts.auth-master') @section('content') <form method="post" action="{{ route('token.perform') }}"> <input type="hidden" name="_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}" /> <img class="mb-4" src="{!! url('images/bootstrap-logo.svg') !!}" alt="" width="72" height="57"> <h1 class="h3 mb-3 fw-normal">Two Factor Authentication</h1> @if(Session::get('authy_error', false)) <div class="alert alert-warning" role="alert"> <i class="fa fa-check"></i> {{ Session::get('authy_error'); }} </div> @endif <div class="form-group form-floating mb-3"> <input type="text" class="form-control" name="authy_token" value="{{ old('authy_token') }}" placeholder="Authy Token" required="required" autofocus> <label for="floatingName">Authy Token</label> @if ($errors->has('authy_token')) <span class="text-danger text-left">{{ $errors->first('authy_token') }}</span> @endif </div> <button class="w-100 btn btn-lg btn-primary" type="submit">Verify</button> @include('auth.partials.copy') </form>
@endsection

Then let's set up our two-factor routes. See below:

/** * Two Factor Routes */
Route::get('/token', 'TwoFactorController@show')->name('token.show');
Route::post('/token', 'TwoFactorController@perform')->name('token.perform');

Here is the full source code of our routes.

<?php use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route; /*
|--------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Web Routes
|--------------------------------------------------------------------------
|
| Here is where you can register web routes for your application. These
| routes are loaded by the RouteServiceProvider within a group which
| contains the "web" middleware group. Now create something great!
|
*/ Route::group(['namespace' => 'App\Http\Controllers'], function()
{ /** * Home Routes */ Route::get('/', 'HomeController@index')->name('home.index'); Route::group(['middleware' => ['guest']], function() { /** * Register Routes */ Route::get('/register', 'RegisterController@show')->name('register.show'); Route::post('/register', 'RegisterController@register')->name('register.perform'); /** * Login Routes */ Route::get('/login', 'LoginController@show')->name('login.show'); Route::post('/login', 'LoginController@login')->name('login.perform'); /** * Two Factor Routes */ Route::get('/token', 'TwoFactorController@show')->name('token.show'); Route::post('/token', 'TwoFactorController@perform')->name('token.perform'); }); Route::group(['middleware' => ['auth']], function() { /** * Profile Routes */ Route::get('/profile', 'ProfileController@index') ->name('profile.index'); Route::post('/profile/two-factor/enable', 'ProfileController@enableTwoFactor') ->name('profile.enableTwoFactor'); Route::post('/profile/two-factor/disable', 'ProfileController@disableTwoFactor') ->name('profile.disableTwoFactor'); Route::get('/profile/two-factor/verification', 'ProfileController@getVerifyTwoFactor') ->name('profile.getVerifyTwoFactor'); Route::post('/profile/two-factor/verification', 'ProfileController@postVerifyTwoFactor') ->name('profile.postVerifyTwoFactor'); /** * Logout Routes */ Route::get('/logout', 'LogoutController@perform')->name('logout.perform'); });
});

Thank you for reading Laravel 9 Two Factor Authentication. I hope this tutorial can help you. Kindly visit here https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/laravel-9-2fa-two-factor-authentication-with-authy if you want to download this code.

Happy coding :)

item.title: Instagram 中的用户在线活动：查看、搜索和点赞 | User Online Activity in Instagram: Views, Searches and Likes
item.description:
了解 Instagram 保存的用户活动数据、查看位置或删除方法。 它的这种受欢迎程度在很大程度上归功于其用于移动设备的版本。 尽管如此，instagram.com 仍跻身全球访问量最大的 20 个网站之列。

我们可以在哪里以及如何查看或删除它？

搜索历史记录

与任何其他社交媒体一样，Instagram 默认保存用户的搜索结果。 只需转到搜索菜单（放大镜图标），然后单击搜索字段。 结果，您将看到所有最近的搜索结果。

要删除搜索历史记录，请转到您的个人资料页面（屏幕底部的人形图标），然后单击“选项”菜单（屏幕上部有三个点）。

在选项菜单中，转到最后一个位置，然后单击“清除搜索历史”。

在搜索历史中，Instagram 会推荐特定的帐户。 要隐藏不需要的，请按住它。 之后，在出现的确认窗口中选择“隐藏”。

喜欢历史

要查看喜欢的历史记录，请转到 Instagram 选项并选择“您喜欢的帖子”行。

要从此菜单中删除出版物，请转到此类出版物并通过点击心形图标删除类似内容。

如何删除或禁用帐户

如果由于某种原因您需要删除您的帐户或使您的 Instagram 的整个历史记录不可用，您可以删除该帐户或将其禁用一段时间。 有什么区别，我们该怎么做？

暂时禁用帐户

如果您暂时禁用您的帐户，您的个人资料、照片、评论和点赞标记将被隐藏，直到您通过登录再次启用该帐户。要禁用您的帐户一段时间：

使用浏览器通过移动设备或计算机登录 instagram.com。

您无法从 Instagram 移动应用程序暂时禁用您的帐户。

点击“编辑个人资料”。

阅读包含所有其他视频教程的完整文章。 也访问我们的Youtube 频道，有超过 400 个视频教程。



原文:

Read about the user activity data saved by Instagram, where to view it or how to delete it. Instagram is one of the most popular and fast-growing social media. It owes much of this popularity to its version for mobile devices. Nevertheless, instagram.com ranks among the twenty most visited websites in the world.

What data about user activity does Instagram save? Where and how can we see or delete it?

Search History

As any other social media, Instagram saves user’s search results by default. Just go to the search menu (the magnifying glass icon) and click in the Search field. As a result, you will see all recent search results.

To delete search history, go to your profile page (a human-shaped icon at the bottom of the screen) and click on the Options menu (with three dots in the upper part of the screen).

In the Options menu, go down to the last position and click on “Clear Search History”.

In the search history, Instagram recommends specific accounts. To hide the one you don’t need, press and hold it. After that, choose “Hide” in the confirmation window that appears.

Like History

To view like history, go to Instagram options and select the line “Posts You’ve Liked”.

To remove a publication from this menu, go to such publication and remove the like by tapping on the heart-shaped icon.

How to Delete or Disable an Account

If for some reason you need to delete your account or make entire history of your Instagram unavailable, you can delete the account or disable it for some time. What is the difference and how can we do it?

Disabling an Account Temporarily

If you disable your account temporarily, your profile, photos, comments and like marks will be hidden until you enable the account again by logging in. To disable your account for some time:

Use a browser to log in to instagram.com with a mobile device or from a computer.

You cannot disable your account temporarily from the Instagram mobile application.

Click on “Edit profile”.

Read the full article with all additional video tutorials. Also visit our Youtube channel, there are over 400 video tutorials.

item.title: 为什么要学习 JavaScript？ | Why should you learn JavaScript?
item.description:
基贝特阿莫斯

发表于您应该学习 JavaScript 的原因有很多。 这是因为 JavaScript 是 Web 浏览器支持和理解的语言。 如果您有网络浏览器和文本编辑器，那么您已经在计算机上安装了解释它所需的一切。 对于初学者来说，它是一种很棒的编程语言，大多数高级软件开发人员至少会了解一些 JavaScript，因为他们在某些时候会遇到它。 第一个原因是您可以比您想象的更快地开始使用 JavaScript 构建非常酷的应用程序。 它可以用于 Web 浏览器的编程，也可以用 JavaScript 编写我们看不到的应用程序的逻辑层代码（例如与数据库的通信），以及游戏、自动化脚本和大量的其他目的。 您将如何处理这取决于您的脚本的目的。

一旦掌握了 JavaScript 的基础知识，就可以使用大量的库和框架。 这些库和框架将真正增强您的软件寿命，并使您在更短的时间内完成更多工作变得更加容易和可能。 这些出色的库和框架的示例包括React、Vue.js、jQuery、Angular 和 Node.js。

克里斯蒂安·费尔南多—— May 3 5月3日



原文:

Kibet Amos

Posted on May 16

There are many reasons why you should want to learn JavaScript. JavaScript originates from 1995, and is often considered the most widely used programming language. This is because JavaScript is the language that web browsers support and understand. You have everything you need to interpret it already installed on your computer if you have a web browser and text editor. It is a great programming language for beginners, and most advanced software developers will know at least some JavaScript because they will have run into it at some point. The first reason is that you can start building really cool apps using JavaScript sooner than you could imagine. JavaScript can be used to write many different types of applications and scripts. It can be used for programming for the web browser, but also the logic layer of code that we cannot see (such as communication with the database) of an application can be programmed in JavaScript, along with games, automation scripts, and a plethora of other purposes. JavaScript can also be used for different programming styles, by which we mean ways to structure and write code. How you would go about this depends on the purpose of your script.

There are a ton of libraries and frameworks you can use once you get the basics of JavaScript down. These libraries and frameworks will really enhance your software life and make it a lot easier and possible to get more done in less time. Examples of these great libraries and frameworks include React, Vue.js, jQuery, Angular, andNode.js.

Cristian Fernando - May 3

item.title: 企业为什么要使用 NLP？ | Why should businesses use NLP?
item.description:
这是您第一次听说自然语言处理（也称为 NLP）吗？ 你对 NLP 有什么看法？ 这基本上涉及使用机器学习来驱动人类语言的含义。

想知道为什么 NLP 很有潜力吗？ 在这篇博文中，我们将了解 NLP 如何帮助企业和公司有效地推动业务发展。

什么是自然语言处理？

让我们扩展我们对这个话题的理解，NLP 是计算机科学、语言学和人工智能的一个子领域，它帮助计算机理解、解释和操纵人类语言。
它在医学研究、商业智能、搜索引擎等多个领域拥有各种现实世界的用例。

为什么您的企业应该利用自然语言处理的力量？

老实说，这是一种超越所有行业的技术，因此任何特别大的公司都有大量文档，大量通过公司或业务进行的通信，您可能会开始忘记正在发生的事情。

为真正有意义的服务代理提供服务，使他们能够专注于客户并进行高质量的客户服务对话。

你知道，客户是企业的重要资产。 制定一些标准以通过数字化转型来拥有/保留它们。

使用 NLP 的方法有很多种，其中包括：帮助更好地了解客户，以及分析客户对您的公司或任何问题的看法。 这可以帮助您专注于解决真正为客户带来价值的问题，从而增加您的价值梦想。

这在哪里需要人类做大量的资源？

通过 NLP，您可以通过提高客户满意度来增加收入，另一方面，它可以优化流程并降低成本。

我想说它目前分为两种技术，因此语音到文本技术通过允许我们将口语转换为文本语言并进一步分析这一点，确实席卷了世界。

神经科技与自然语言处理（NLP）的关系

当您解决业务挑战时，自然语言处理是一个强大的工具，与公司和初创公司的数字化转型相关。 使用来自经验丰富的技术专长的 NLP 解决方案改善您的业务体验。

希望你觉得这篇文章有用，分享是关怀。



原文:

Is this your first time hearing about Natural Language Processing(also known as NLP )? What do you think about NLP? this basically deals with using Machine Learning to drive meaning from human languages.

Want to know why NLP is very potential? In this blog post, we are going to see how NLP can help businesses and companies to drive their businesses effectively.

What is Natural Language Processing?

Let's expand our understanding of this topic, NLP is a sub-field of computer science, linguistics, and artificial intelligence that helps the computer understand, interpret and manipulate human language.
NLP has existed for more than 50 years. It has a variety of real-world use cases in a number of fields, including medical research, business intelligence, search engines, etc.

Why should your business harness the power of Natural Language Processing?

Honestly, it is a technique that transcends all industries so any company that's particularly large has a lot of documentation, a lot of communications that are going through the company or business, where you might start losing track of what's happening.

NLP techniques can help automatically filter this down and help people navigate these landscapes of documentation.

How can NLP be used in a business?

NLP interfaces or chatbots are really great ways to automate some of the repetitive processes that service consultants usually go through and so by automating repetitive questions we can help to only channel conversations.

To service agents that are really meaningful allowing them to concentrate on the customer and to have high-quality customer service conversations.

Customers are important assets in a business, you know. Make some standards to have/keep them through digital transformation.

There are myriad ways to use NLP some of them include: helping to understand customers better, and analyzing what customers are saying about your company or any issue. This could help you to focus to solve issues that really drive values to the customers increasing your value dreams.

The benefit of NLP you can do what humans can do, any NLP engine can read through thousands even millions of documents and summarize them and make sense of them in seconds. Where is this would take a lot of resources for humans to do?

Another great use case of NLP in business is Sentiment analysis that use to understand how customers respond and talk about different topics or products. Through NLP you can increase revenue due to higher customer satisfaction and on the other hand, it can optimize processes and reduce costs.

I would say it's split between two technologies at the moment so speech-to-text technologies have really taken the world by storm by allowing us to transform spoken language into text language and further analyze this.

Another amazing use case of NLP being able to communicate with computers, just makes it a lot more approachable for consumers.

Relationship Between Neurotech and Natural Language Processing(NLP)

Natural Language Processing is a powerful tool when your solve business challenges, associating with the digital transformation of companies and startups. Sarufi and Neurotech offer high-standard solutions concerning conversational AI(chatbots). Improve your business experience today with NLP solutions from experienced technical expertise.

Hope you find this article useful, sharing is caring.

item.title: 如何快速写作业？ | How To Write An Assignment Fast?
item.description:
时间压力一直是学生的大问题。 此外，学生必须在一天或一周内完成多项作业。 他们必须每天写几篇论文、案例研究、项目报告、实践等。 他们甚至必须按时提交作业。 因此，他们需要学习如何快速写作业？

本博客将解释一些有效的技巧和策略，帮助学生快速完成作业。

然后，您可以从专家那里获得计算机科学作业帮助。
什么是任务？

作业是老师或导师交给学生在规定时间内完成的任务。 它们也可以被称为作为学习的一部分分配给某人的工作。

此外，作业也有书面的、实践的、实地考察的或艺术的，甚至是在线的。 作业的主要目的是确保学生全面理解主题。

如何使用有效的技巧快速写作业？

这里有一些快速写作业的有效技巧。

了解作业

在开始工作之前了解任务非常重要。 作为一名学生，你应该理解这个话题，并充分意识到你应该写什么，以及老师想要从你那里得到什么。 这将是解决编写经过充分研究的作业问题的第一步。 您如何正确理解作业？ 你如何正确格式化它？ 让我们在下面检查。

无情效率的研究

每个设计任务都有一个预设计阶段，其中问题、目标、受众和一些其他因素都得到了很好的定义。 然后，每个设计作业都需要进行评估和批评，然后学生才能就满足问题和目标的设计达成一致。 预设计阶段是快速设计研究发挥作用的地方。 目标是尽可能多地快速学习，以便做出最佳决策。

创建大纲

创建大纲是如何快速编写作业的最佳技巧。
大纲是作业的基本结构。 大纲可以帮助你组织你的想法，这样你就可以写出更好的作业。 如果你没有一个结构良好的大纲，那么你可以确定你的作业会一团糟。

当您第一次想到编写大纲时，您可能会想到一个没有基本结构的无聊的要点列表。 虽然这是真的，但创建大纲对于创建出色的作业至关重要。

创造优秀的写作环境

创造出色写作环境的秘诀是拥有出色的工具。 您需要有一个可以快速写作而不会分心的地方。 你需要有正确的工具来表达你的想法。

要创建一个无干扰的学习空间，请按照以下步骤操作。

去一个好学的地方
这可能是图书馆的安静部分、校外咖啡店，甚至是你的宿舍。 只要您知道人们不会分散您的注意力或打扰您，那就是您必须去的地方。

让它舒服

如果你的椅子感觉像桌子摇晃或钉床一样，你将无法专注于写作业。 在写作业或其他任何事情之前，请注意您的身体舒适度。

阻止数字干扰

你应该在写作业时阻止数字干扰。 数字干扰可能会对您的作业产生不良影响。 在数字干扰中，您应该关闭手机上的互联网并将手机置于飞行模式。

遵循标准结构

您可以采用许多不同的方法，但请确保您能够写入一致的结构，因为这使用户更容易阅读。 一致的结构还将使搜索引擎更容易理解您的任务。

注重质量而不是数量

如果您想提高工作和生活的质量，那么您需要关注质量而不是数量。 这是您可能在工作场所听到的常见短语，但它的真正含义是什么？

写结论

如何为作业、报告或任何其他类型的论文写结论？ 结论是最后一部分； 这是读者对你作品的最终印象。 让它变得更好是非常重要的，它应该是有趣的，它应该包括一个行动号召。

结论

在这篇博客中，我们提到了一些如何快速写作业的技巧。

我们希望这篇文章能够为您提供一些快速编写作业的有用技巧。 尝试平衡学习与工作和社交生活可能是一场真正的斗争。 但是，有了正确的提示，您应该能够找到一种方法来管理您的时间并快速完成您的任务，从而节省您做生活中其他您喜欢的事情的时间！ 如果您对快速编写作业有任何其他问题或疑虑，请联系我们的团队。



原文:


Time pressure is always a big problem for students. Moreover, students have to complete several assignments in a day or a week. They have to write several essays, case studies, project reports, practicals, etc. on a daily basis. They even have to submit assignments on time. Therefore, they need to learn how to write an assignment fast?

This blog will explain some effective tips and strategies that help students write an assignment fast.

_Note:- If you are a computer science student and troubling with your computer science assignment. Then you can take Computer Science Assignment Help from experts.
_

What Is The Assignment?

An assignment is a task given to the students by their teachers or tutors to complete within the time. They can also be referred to as work assigned to somebody as a part of learning.

In addition, assignments are also in the form of written, practical, fieldwork or art, or even online. The primary purpose of the assignment is to make sure that students understand the subject matter comprehensively.

How To Write An Assignment Fast With Effective Tips?

Here are some effective tips for writing an assignment fast.

Understand the Assignment

It is very crucial that you understand the assignment before you start working on it. As a student, you should understand the topic and be fully aware of what you are expected to write about and what the teacher wants from you. This will be the first step in solving the problem of writing a well-researched assignment. How do you understand the assignment correctly? How do you format it correctly? Let’s check below.

Research with Ruthless Efficiency

Every design assignment has a pre-design phase where the problem, goals, audience, and a handful of other factors are well-defined. Every design assignment then needs to be evaluated and critiqued before the students can agree on a design that meets the problem and goal. That pre-design phase is where quick design research comes into play. The goal is to quickly learn as much as you can so you can make the best decisions possible.

Create an outline

Creating an outline is the best tip for how to write an assignment fast.
The outline is the basic structure of your assignment. The outline helps you organize your thoughts so you can write a better assignment. If you don't have a well-structured outline, then you can be sure that your assignment will be a mess.

When you first think of writing an outline, you probably think of a boring list of bullet points with no fundamental structure. While that's true, creating an outline is vital for creating an excellent assignment.

Create the Excellent Writing Environment

The secret to creating a great writing environment is to have excellent tools. You need to have a place where you can quickly write without being distracted. You need to have the right tools to be able to express your ideas.

For creating a distraction-free study space, follow the given below steps.

Go to a studious place
This could be a quiet part of the library, an off-campus coffee shop, or even your dorm room. Wherever you know that people won’t distract or interrupt you, that’s the place you must go.

Make it comfortable

You won't be able to focus on writing an assignment if your chair feels like a table wobbles or the bed of nails. Take care of your physical comfort before writing an assignment or anything else.

Block digital distractions

You should block digital distractions while writing the assignment. Digital distractions can have a bad effect on your assignment. In digital distraction, you should keep the internet off on the phone and put the phone in airplane mode.

Follow a Standard structure

There are many different approaches you can take but make sure that you are able to write to a consistent structure because that makes it easier for the user to read. A consistent structure will also make it easier for search engines to understand your assignment.

Focus On Quality Over Quantity

If you want to improve the quality of your work and life, then you need to focus on quality over quantity. This is a common phrase that you may hear around the workplace, but what does it really mean?

Write the Conclusion

How to write a conclusion for an assignment, report, or any other type of paper? The conclusion is the last part; it's the final impression that readers have of your work. It's extremely important to make it good, it should be interesting and it should include a call to action.

Conclusion

In this blog, we have mentioned some tips for how to write an assignment fast.

We hope that this post has been able to provide you with some useful tips for writing an assignment fast. It can be a real struggle to try and balance your studies with your work and social life. However, with the right tips, you should be able to find a way to manage your time and complete your assignments quickly, saving you time to do the other things in your life that you love! If you have any other questions or concerns about writing an assignment fast, please contact our team.

item.title: Askeva 基于whatsapp 的聊天机器人服务提供商 | Askeva the whatsapp based chatbot service provider
item.description:
对话是商业的未来。 中小型公司也从 WhatsApp 商务中获得服务，因为它已经发展成为一个独立的交易渠道。
随着越来越多的公司发现参与 WhatsApp 商务的好处，该平台正在超越仅仅作为客户服务渠道。

  1. 更快的客户支持 WhatsApp Commerce 为所有企业提供终极个性化的客户服务，从处理在线课程到电子商务商店。 每个客户都只是一个通信关闭。 客户可以访问它，因为帮助或解释也只是一种沟通方式。
  2. 轻松的反馈和沟通 以需求为基础的商务对企业和客户来说都是胜利的手掌。 该企业可以 24×7 全天候访问其客户，对于客户而言，基于需求的沟通消除了电子邮件订阅所期望的持续促销弹幕流。
  3. 建立卓越的品牌与客户联系 借助 WhatsApp 商务，品牌可以在 20 亿人都熟悉的最流行的消息平台上实时发布通知和公告，与客户联系。 他们只需要与您的品牌交谈并进行交流即可。 这些关系还用于交换重要的注意事项和信息，例如购买和交付文件以及旅行详细信息。 欲了解更多信息，请访问我们的网站https://www.askeva.in并立即开始您自己的 whatsapp 聊天机器人。



原文:

Conversation is the future of commerce. WhatsApp now is far than just a conversation app, with over 175 million businesses using it daily to promote their business and exchange. Small and medium-scale companies have also served from WhatsApp commerce, as it has evolved into an independent deals channel.
The WhatsApp commerce app is designed as a more individualized and pleasurable shopping experience for the guests because it allows one-on-one commerce. As further and further companies discover the benefits of engaging in WhatsApp commerce, the platform is moving beyond just being a client service channel.

  1. Faster Client Support WhatsApp commerce provides ultimate personalization of client service for all businesses ranging from those dealing online courses to an ecommerce shop. Every client is just a communication off. It’s accessible for the client since help or explanation is also just one communication down.
  2. Easy Feedback And Communication The need- grounded commerce is a victory- palm for both the business and the client. The business has 24×7 access to its customers, and for the customer, need-based communication eliminates the stream of constant promotional barrage expected from email subscriptions.
  3. Build Superior Brand-to- client Connections With WhatsApp commerce, brands can shoot notices and announcements to connect with their clients in real- time and on the most popular messaging platform universally, one that 2 billion people are familiar with. WhatsApp commerce enables two- way communication where the client can also directly reach the brand. They just have to chatter with your brand and shoot a communication. These relations are also used for swapping critical cautions and information like purchase and delivery documentations and trip details. For more information kindly visit our site https://www.askeva.in and start your own whatsapp chatbot now.

item.title: 使用 Elementor 在 WordPress 中创建登录页面 | Create a Landing Page in WordPress using Elementor
item.description:
如果您是一个没有任何编码知识的初学者并希望创建一个有吸引力且高度可转换的目标网页，那么 elementor 应该是您的首选。

主要是如果您打算将您的实体业务转移到在线，那么 elementor 肯定会帮助您以低投资或零投资来满足您的愿望。 使用以下步骤，您可以通过免费模板创建基本登录页面。 但是，如果您希望创建由顶级公司和网站提供的高级登录页面，那么您可以转移到 elementor pro，您可以在其中访问高级模板和自定义功能等。

因此，让我们深入了解如何使用 Elementor 插件创建登录页面。

第 1 步： *在您的 WordPress 仪表板中安装并激活 Elementor *

在 WordPress 中安装和激活 Elementor 插件并不是一个困难的过程。

  • 首先，您必须登录您的 WordPress 仪表板。
  • 接下来导航到 WordPress 仪表板左侧边栏中的插件菜单。
  • 单击插件菜单下的添加新的。
  • 在右上角，您可能会找到一个搜索栏，点击它并输入 elementor
  • 出现搜索结果后点击安装按钮
  • 接下来单击激活以在您的 WordPress 仪表板中添加 elementor
  • 激活完成后，您可以在左侧找到 Elementor 菜单

阅读更多： 如何使用 Elementor（免费）和 Beaver Builder 在 WordPress 中创建登录页面？

原文:

Elementor is one of the well known freemium WordPress plugins that allows you to create landing pages as well as customize your website pages. If you are a beginner without any prior coding knowledge and looking to create an attractive and highly convertible landing page then elementor should be your first choice.

Mainly if you are planning to shift your physical business to online then elementor will surely help you in fulfilling your desire with low to no investment. Using the below steps you can create a basic landing page through free templates. However if you wish to create an advanced landing page that is offered by top companies and websites then you can shift to elementor pro where you can access premium templates and customization features and more.

So, let’s dive in and see how you can create a landing page using the Elementor plugin.

Step 1: *Install and Activate Elementor into your WordPress dashboard *

Installing and Activating the Elementor plugin in your WordPress is not a difficult process.

  • Firstly you have to log into your WordPress dashboard.
  • Next navigate to the Plugins menu in the left sidebar for your WordPress dashboard.
  • Click on the Add new under plugin menu.
  • In the right corner, you may find a search bar click on that and type in elementor
  • After the search result appears to click on the install button
  • Next click on activate to add elementor in your WordPress dashboard
  • After the activation is completed you can find an Elementor menu on your left side of your

Read More: How To Create A Landing Page In WordPress Using Elementor (For Free) And Beaver Builder?

item.title: 如何使用 FPDF 示例实现 Laravel 8 | How to Implement Laravel 8 using FPDF Example
item.description:
原贴@https ://codeanddeploy.com访问并下载示例代码：
在这篇文章中，我将向您展示如何使用 FPDF 实现 Laravel 8。 让我们使用 FPDF 作为我们的包来使用 Laravel 生成 PDF。

在我之前的帖子中，我有几个关于 PDF 和其他包的示例。 现在让我们使用 FPDF。

第 1 步：Laravel 安装

如果您的本地没有安装 Laravel 8，只需运行以下命令：

 composer create - project -- prefer - dist laravel / laravel laravel - fpdf cd laravel - fpdf

第 2 步：安装 FPDF 包

要在 Laravel 中生成 PDF，我们需要安装laravel-fpdf包。 运行以下命令：

 composer require codedge / laravel - fpdf

第 3 步：设置路由和控制器

让我们为 Laravel FPDF 生成器创建路由和控制器。

路由.php/web.php

 <?php use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route ; use App\Http\Controllers\PdfController ; /* |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Web Routes |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Here is where you can register web routes for your application. These | routes are loaded by the RouteServiceProvider within a group which | contains the "web" middleware group. Now create something great! | */ Route :: get ( '/' , function () { return view ( 'welcome' ); }); Route :: get ( 'pdf' , [ PdfController :: class , 'index' ]);

运行以下命令来制作控制器：

 php artisan make : controller PdfController

第 4 步：Laravel FPDF 示例

然后编辑生成的PdfController 。 见下文：

 <?php namespace App\Http\Controllers ; use Codedge\Fpdf\Fpdf\Fpdf ; use Illuminate\Http\Request ; class PdfController extends Controller { protected $fpdf ; public function __construct () { $this -> fpdf = new Fpdf ; } public function index () { $this -> fpdf -> SetFont ( 'Arial' , 'B' , 15 ); $this -> fpdf -> AddPage ( "L" , [ '100' , '100' ]); $this -> fpdf -> Text ( 10 , 10 , "Hello World!" ); $this -> fpdf -> Output (); exit ; } }

结果如下：

现在你已经基本了解了如何使用 Laravel FPDF 包。 我希望它有所帮助。

要了解有关此软件包的更多信息，请访问此处。

我希望本教程可以帮助你。 如果您想下载此代码，请访问此处https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/jquery/how-to-check-if-image-is-loaded-or-not-in-jquery 。

快乐编码:)



原文:

Originally posted @ https://codeanddeploy.com visit and download the sample code:
https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/how-to-implement-laravel-8-using-fpdf-example

In this post, I will show you an example how to implement Laravel 8 using FPDF. Let's use FPDF as our package to generate PDF with Laravel.

In my previous post I have sereval examples about PDF with other packages. Now let's do with FPDF.

Step 1: Laravel Installation

If you don't have a Laravel 8 install in your local just run the following command below:

composer create-project --prefer-dist laravel/laravel laravel-fpdf cd laravel-fpdf

Step 2: Install FPDF Package

To generate PDF in Laravel we need to install laravel-fpdf package. Run the following command below:

composer require codedge/laravel-fpdf

Step 3: Setup Routes and Controller

Let's create routes and controller for our Laravel FPDF generator.

routes.php/web.php

<?php use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route;
use App\Http\Controllers\PdfController; /*
|--------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Web Routes
|--------------------------------------------------------------------------
|
| Here is where you can register web routes for your application. These
| routes are loaded by the RouteServiceProvider within a group which
| contains the "web" middleware group. Now create something great!
|
*/ Route::get('/', function () { return view('welcome');
}); Route::get('pdf', [PdfController::class, 'index']);

Run the command below to make a controller:

php artisan make:controller PdfController

Step 4: Laravel FPDF Example

Then edit the PdfController generated. See below:

<?php namespace App\Http\Controllers; use Codedge\Fpdf\Fpdf\Fpdf;
use Illuminate\Http\Request; class PdfController extends Controller
{ protected $fpdf; public function __construct() { $this->fpdf = new Fpdf; } public function index() { $this->fpdf->SetFont('Arial', 'B', 15); $this->fpdf->AddPage("L", ['100', '100']); $this->fpdf->Text(10, 10, "Hello World!"); $this->fpdf->Output(); exit; }
}

Here is the result:

Now you have a basic how to work with Laravel FPDF package. I hope it helps.

To learn more about this package please visit here.

I hope this tutorial can help you. Kindly visit here https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/jquery/how-to-check-if-image-is-loaded-or-not-in-jquery if you want to download this code.

Happy coding :)
item.author: codeanddeploy

item.title: Laravel 一对一的雄辩关系教程和示例 | Laravel One to One Eloquent Relationship Tutorial and Example
item.description:
原贴@https ://codeanddeploy.com访问并下载示例代码：
在本教程中，您将学习实现 Laravel 8 的一对一关系。 如果你是 Laravel 新手，本教程适合你。 我将向您展示一个易于理解的示例，并且可以在您未来的 Laravel 项目中对您有所帮助。

在此示例中，我们将使用users表和user_contact_infos表，这些表通过user_contact_infos表中的user_id键连接，用户拥有用户联系信息。

首先，我们需要先使用 Laravel eloquent 为我们的一对一关系创建表。

第 1 步：创建迁移

由于默认情况下 Laravel 安装已经有一个 users 表，我们将跳过它并为我们的user_contact_infos表运行迁移。

运行以下命令：

 php artisan make : migration create_user_contact_infos_table

下面是完整的代码：

 <?php use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration ; use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint ; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema ; class CreateUserContactInfosTable extends Migration { /** * Run the migrations. * * @return void */ public function up () { Schema :: create ( 'user_contact_infos' , function ( Blueprint $table ) { $table -> id (); $table -> unsignedBigInteger ( 'user_id' ); $table -> string ( 'city' ); $table -> string ( 'phone' ); $table -> timestamps (); }); } /** * Reverse the migrations. * * @return void */ public function down () { Schema :: dropIfExists ( 'user_contact_infos' ); } }

为了本教程的目的，我还将向您展示用户表迁移的代码：

 <?php use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration ; use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint ; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema ; class CreateUsersTable extends Migration { /** * Run the migrations. * * @return void */ public function up () { Schema :: create ( 'users' , function ( Blueprint $table ) { $table -> id (); $table -> string ( 'name' ); $table -> string ( 'email' ) -> unique (); $table -> timestamp ( 'email_verified_at' ) -> nullable (); $table -> string ( 'password' ); $table -> rememberToken (); $table -> timestamps (); }); } /** * Reverse the migrations. * * @return void */ public function down () { Schema :: dropIfExists ( 'users' ); } }

第 2 步：Laravel 一对一模型

现在让我们为User.php设置一个模型，因为它已经包含在安装中，我们不需要运行命令：

见下面的代码：

 <?php namespace App\Models ; use App\Models\UserContactInfo ; use Laravel\Sanctum\HasApiTokens ; use Illuminate\Notifications\Notifiable ; use Illuminate\Contracts\Auth\MustVerifyEmail ; use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory ; use Illuminate\Foundation\Auth\User as Authenticatable ; class User extends Authenticatable { use HasApiTokens , HasFactory , Notifiable ; /** * The attributes that are mass assignable. * * @var array<int, string> */ protected $fillable = [ 'name' , 'email' , 'password' , ]; /** * The attributes that should be hidden for serialization. * * @var array<int, string> */ protected $hidden = [ 'password' , 'remember_token' , ]; /** * The attributes that should be cast. * * @var array<string, string> */ protected $casts = [ 'email_verified_at' => 'datetime' , ]; /** * Get the phone record associated with the user. */ public function user_contact_info () { return $this -> hasOne ( UserContactInfo :: class ); } }

正如您在上面看到的，我们为hasOne()添加了user_contact_info()方法，这是我们相关模型类的名称。

现在让我们创建一个UserContactInfo.php模型。 运行以下命令：

 php artisan make : model UserContactInfo

下面是我们的UserContactInfo模型的完整代码。

 <?php namespace App\Models ; use App\Models\User ; use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model ; use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory ; class UserContactInfo extends Model { use HasFactory ; /** * Get the user that owns the contact info. */ public function user () { return $this -> belongsTo ( User :: class ); } }

如您所见，我们为user()添加了一个带有belongsTo()方法的方法。 它将自动尝试查找 ID 与UserContactInfo模型上的 user_id 列匹配的 User 模型。

现在我们已经建立了 Laravel 一对一的关系模型。 让我们尝试为此创建一些数据。

第 3 步：在 Laravel 一对一关系上创建数据

在本节中，我们将创建具有用户联系信息的用户来测试我们的 Laravel 一对一关系。

创建用户的记录。

 // Create User $user = new User ; $user -> name = 'Juan Dela Cruz' ; $user -> email = 'juan@gmail.com' ; $user -> password = bcrypt ( 'password' ); $user -> save (); $user = new User ; $user -> name = 'Juana Santa Cruz' ; $user -> email = 'juana@gmail.com' ; $user -> password = bcrypt ( 'password' ); $user -> save ();

创建用户联系信息。

 $user = User :: find ( 1 ); $userContactInfo = new UserContactInfo ; $userContactInfo -> city = 'Bayawan City' ; $userContactInfo -> phone = '09261234567' ; $user -> user_contact_info () -> save ( $userContactInfo );

如果您有相同的用户联系信息并希望其他用户使用它，则将应用以下代码。

 $userContactInfo = UserContactInfo :: find ( 1 ); $user = User :: find ( 2 ); $userContactInfo -> user () -> associate ( $user ) -> save ();

第 4 步：检索 Laravel 一对一关系

现在让我们使用 Laravel 一对一的关系检索记录。 请参见下面的示例。

 $userContactInfo = User :: find ( 1 ) -> user_contact_info ; dd ( $userContactInfo );

我希望本教程可以帮助你。 如果您想下载此代码，请访问此处https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/laravel-one-to-one-eloquent-relationship-tutorial-and-example 。

快乐编码:)



原文:

Originally posted @ https://codeanddeploy.com visit and download the sample code:
https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/laravel-one-to-one-eloquent-relationship-tutorial-and-example

In this tutorial, you will learn to implement the Laravel 8 one to one relationship. One-to-one model relation in Laravel is the basic relationship that we usually encounter when doing the Laravel project. If you're new to Laravel this tutorial is for you. I will show you an example that is easy to understand and may help you in your future projects on Laravel.

In this example, we will use the users table and user_contact_infos table and these tables are connected which the user has a user contact info with the use of user_id key inside user_contact_infos table.

To start we need to create first our tables for our one-to-one relationship using Laravel eloquent.

Step 1: Create Migration

Since in default the Laravel installations have a users table already we will just skip it and run the migration for our user_contact_infos table.

Run the following command:

php artisan make:migration create_user_contact_infos_table

Here is the complete code below:

<?php use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration;
use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema; class CreateUserContactInfosTable extends Migration
{ /** * Run the migrations. * * @return void */ public function up() { Schema::create('user_contact_infos', function (Blueprint $table) { $table->id(); $table->unsignedBigInteger('user_id'); $table->string('city'); $table->string('phone'); $table->timestamps(); }); } /** * Reverse the migrations. * * @return void */ public function down() { Schema::dropIfExists('user_contact_infos'); }
}

For the sake of this tutorial I will show you also the code for users table migration:

<?php use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration;
use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema; class CreateUsersTable extends Migration
{ /** * Run the migrations. * * @return void */ public function up() { Schema::create('users', function (Blueprint $table) { $table->id(); $table->string('name'); $table->string('email')->unique(); $table->timestamp('email_verified_at')->nullable(); $table->string('password'); $table->rememberToken(); $table->timestamps(); }); } /** * Reverse the migrations. * * @return void */ public function down() { Schema::dropIfExists('users'); }
}

Step 2: Laravel One to One Models

Now let's set up our User.php a model since it is already included in the installation we don't need to run a command:

See below code:

<?php namespace App\Models; use App\Models\UserContactInfo;
use Laravel\Sanctum\HasApiTokens;
use Illuminate\Notifications\Notifiable;
use Illuminate\Contracts\Auth\MustVerifyEmail;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Foundation\Auth\User as Authenticatable; class User extends Authenticatable
{ use HasApiTokens, HasFactory, Notifiable; /** * The attributes that are mass assignable. * * @var array<int, string> */ protected $fillable = [ 'name', 'email', 'password', ]; /** * The attributes that should be hidden for serialization. * * @var array<int, string> */ protected $hidden = [ 'password', 'remember_token', ]; /** * The attributes that should be cast. * * @var array<string, string> */ protected $casts = [ 'email_verified_at' => 'datetime', ]; /** * Get the phone record associated with the user. */ public function user_contact_info() { return $this->hasOne(UserContactInfo::class); }
}

As you can see above we added the user_contact_info() method for hasOne() which is the name of our related model class.

Now let's create a UserContactInfo.php model. Run the following command:

php artisan make:model UserContactInfo

Here is the complete code below of our UserContactInfo model.

<?php namespace App\Models; use App\Models\User;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory; class UserContactInfo extends Model
{ use HasFactory; /** * Get the user that owns the contact info. */ public function user() { return $this->belongsTo(User::class); }
}

As you can see we added user() a method with belongsTo() method. It will automatically attempt to find a User model that has an id that matches the user_id column on the UserContactInfo model.

Now we have already set up our Laravel one-to-one relationship models. Let's try to create some data for this.

Step 3: Create Data on Laravel One to One Relationship

In this section, we will create users with user contact info to test our Laravel one-to-one relationship.

Creating user's record.

// Create User
$user = new User;
$user->name = 'Juan Dela Cruz';
$user->email = 'juan@gmail.com';
$user->password = bcrypt('password');
$user->save(); $user = new User;
$user->name = 'Juana Santa Cruz';
$user->email = 'juana@gmail.com';
$user->password = bcrypt('password');
$user->save();

Creating user contact info.

$user = User::find(1); $userContactInfo = new UserContactInfo;
$userContactInfo->city = 'Bayawan City';
$userContactInfo->phone = '09261234567'; $user->user_contact_info()->save($userContactInfo);

If you have the same user contact info and want to use it by the other user then the code below will be applied.

$userContactInfo = UserContactInfo::find(1); $user = User::find(2); $userContactInfo->user()->associate($user)->save();

Step 4: Retrieve Laravel One to One Relationship

Now let's retrieve the records using Laravel one-to-one relationship. See the below example.

$userContactInfo = User::find(1)->user_contact_info;
dd($userContactInfo);

I hope this tutorial can help you. Kindly visit here https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/laravel-one-to-one-eloquent-relationship-tutorial-and-example if you want to download this code.

Happy coding :)

item.title: Laravel 8 HasOne() 示例 | Laravel 8 HasOne() Example
item.description:
原贴@https ://codeanddeploy.com访问并下载示例代码：
在这篇文章中，我将与您分享一个如何在模型关系上使用Laravel 8 hasOne()方法的示例。 在我之前的教程中，我分享了如何实现Laravel 一对一关系，该关系用于链接两个表中的记录，每个表中的每条记录只显示一次。

让我们创建两个相互连接的表。 用户表有联系信息的位置。

第 1 步：为我们的 Laravel hasOne() 测试创建迁移

在此示例中，我们将为user_contact_infos表创建迁移，因为我们将使用默认用户表。

运行以下命令：

 php artisan make : migration create_user_contact_infos_table

下面是完整的代码：

 <?php use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration ; use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint ; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema ; class CreateUserContactInfosTable extends Migration { /** * Run the migrations. * * @return void */ public function up () { Schema :: create ( 'user_contact_infos' , function ( Blueprint $table ) { $table -> id (); $table -> unsignedBigInteger ( 'user_id' ); $table -> string ( 'city' ); $table -> string ( 'phone' ); $table -> timestamps (); }); } /** * Reverse the migrations. * * @return void */ public function down () { Schema :: dropIfExists ( 'user_contact_infos' ); } }

现在我们已经完成了迁移。 让我们运行下面的命令来迁移它。

我假设users表已经包含在内。

接下来，让我们将 Laravel hasOne() 方法应用于我们的模型。

第 2 步：应用 Laravel hasOne() 方法

我们将首先创建我们的 UserContactInfo.php 模型。 运行以下命令：

 php artisan make : model UserContactInfo

下面是我们的 UserContactInfo 模型的完整代码。

 <?php namespace App\Models ; use App\Models\User ; use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model ; use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory ; class UserContactInfo extends Model { use HasFactory ; /** * Get the user that owns the contact info. */ public function user () { return $this -> belongsTo ( User :: class ); } }

接下来，我们将设置我们的 User.php 模型。 请参阅下面的完整代码：

 <?php namespace App\Models ; use App\Models\UserContactInfo ; use Laravel\Sanctum\HasApiTokens ; use Illuminate\Notifications\Notifiable ; use Illuminate\Contracts\Auth\MustVerifyEmail ; use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory ; use Illuminate\Foundation\Auth\User as Authenticatable ; class User extends Authenticatable { use HasApiTokens , HasFactory , Notifiable ; /** * The attributes that are mass assignable. * * @var array<int, string> */ protected $fillable = [ 'name' , 'email' , 'password' , ]; /** * The attributes that should be hidden for serialization. * * @var array<int, string> */ protected $hidden = [ 'password' , 'remember_token' , ]; /** * The attributes that should be cast. * * @var array<string, string> */ protected $casts = [ 'email_verified_at' => 'datetime' , ]; /** * Get the phone record associated with the user. */ public function user_contact_info () { return $this -> hasOne ( UserContactInfo :: class ); } }

如您所见，我们在user_contact_info() () 方法中为我们的 User.php 模型类实现了 Laravel hasOne() 方法，该方法是我们相关模型类的名称。

第 3 步：让我们使用 Laravel hasOne() 保存记录

创建用户的记录。

 // Create User $user = new User ; $user -> name = 'Juan Dela Cruz' ; $user -> email = 'juan@gmail.com' ; $user -> password = bcrypt ( 'password' ); $user -> save (); $user = new User ; $user -> name = 'Juana Santa Cruz' ; $user -> email = 'juana@gmail.com' ; $user -> password = bcrypt ( 'password' ); $user -> save ();

创建用户联系信息。

 $user = User :: find ( 1 ); $userContactInfo = new UserContactInfo ; $userContactInfo -> city = 'Dumaguete City' ; $userContactInfo -> phone = '09261234567' ; $user -> user_contact_info () -> save ( $userContactInfo );

如果您有相同的用户联系信息并希望其他用户使用它，则将应用以下代码。

 $userContactInfo = UserContactInfo :: find ( 1 ); $user = User :: find ( 2 ); $userContactInfo -> user () -> associate ( $user ) -> save ();

检索记录示例：

 $userContactInfo = User :: find ( 1 ) -> user_contact_info ; dd ( $userContactInfo );

我希望本教程可以帮助你。 如果您想下载此代码，请访问此处https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/laravel-8-hasone-example 。

快乐编码:)



原文:

Originally posted @ https://codeanddeploy.com visit and download the sample code:
https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/laravel-8-hasone-example

In this post, I will share with you an example of how to use the Laravel 8 hasOne() method on the model relationships. In my previous tutorial, I shared how to implement the Laravel one-to-one relationship which is used to link between the record in two tables, where each record in each table only show once.

Laravel hasOne() method is really helpful when doing Laravel one-to-one relationship which is used to retrieve the related record using Eloquent's dynamic properties.

Let's create two tables that are connected to each other. Where the user's table has contact info.

Step 1: Create Migration for our Laravel hasOne() Testing

In this example, we will just create migration for our user_contact_infos table since we will use the default users table.

Run the following command:

php artisan make:migration create_user_contact_infos_table

Here is the complete code below:

<?php use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration;
use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema; class CreateUserContactInfosTable extends Migration
{ /** * Run the migrations. * * @return void */ public function up() { Schema::create('user_contact_infos', function (Blueprint $table) { $table->id(); $table->unsignedBigInteger('user_id'); $table->string('city'); $table->string('phone'); $table->timestamps(); }); } /** * Reverse the migrations. * * @return void */ public function down() { Schema::dropIfExists('user_contact_infos'); }
}

Now we have our migration already. Let's run the command below to migrate it.

I assume that users table is already included.

Next, let's apply the Laravel hasOne() method to our model.

Step 2: Apply Laravel hasOne() method

We will create first our UserContactInfo.php model. Run the following command:

php artisan make:model UserContactInfo

Here is the complete code below of our UserContactInfo model.

<?php namespace App\Models; use App\Models\User;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory; class UserContactInfo extends Model
{ use HasFactory; /** * Get the user that owns the contact info. */ public function user() { return $this->belongsTo(User::class); }
}

Next, we will set up our User.php model. See below the complete code:

<?php namespace App\Models; use App\Models\UserContactInfo;
use Laravel\Sanctum\HasApiTokens;
use Illuminate\Notifications\Notifiable;
use Illuminate\Contracts\Auth\MustVerifyEmail;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Foundation\Auth\User as Authenticatable; class User extends Authenticatable
{ use HasApiTokens, HasFactory, Notifiable; /** * The attributes that are mass assignable. * * @var array<int, string> */ protected $fillable = [ 'name', 'email', 'password', ]; /** * The attributes that should be hidden for serialization. * * @var array<int, string> */ protected $hidden = [ 'password', 'remember_token', ]; /** * The attributes that should be cast. * * @var array<string, string> */ protected $casts = [ 'email_verified_at' => 'datetime', ]; /** * Get the phone record associated with the user. */ public function user_contact_info() { return $this->hasOne(UserContactInfo::class); }
}

As you can see we implemented the Laravel hasOne() method to our User.php model class inside the user_contact_info() method which is the name of our related model class.

Step 3: Let's Save Record using Laravel hasOne()

Creating user's record.

// Create User
$user = new User;
$user->name = 'Juan Dela Cruz';
$user->email = 'juan@gmail.com';
$user->password = bcrypt('password');
$user->save(); $user = new User;
$user->name = 'Juana Santa Cruz';
$user->email = 'juana@gmail.com';
$user->password = bcrypt('password');
$user->save();

Creating user contact info.

$user = User::find(1); $userContactInfo = new UserContactInfo;
$userContactInfo->city = 'Dumaguete City';
$userContactInfo->phone = '09261234567'; $user->user_contact_info()->save($userContactInfo);

If you have the same user contact info and want to use it by the other user then the code below will be applied.

$userContactInfo = UserContactInfo::find(1); $user = User::find(2); $userContactInfo->user()->associate($user)->save();

Retrieve Record Example:

$userContactInfo = User::find(1)->user_contact_info;
dd($userContactInfo);

I hope this tutorial can help you. Kindly visit here https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/laravel-8-hasone-example if you want to download this code.

Happy coding :)
